schema.id: string — unique identifier, e.g. opp-0001, immutable once assigned
schema.source: string — one of the 19 sources in opportunity-sources.md, e.g. Upwork, LinkedIn Jobs, UAE Recruiters
schema.sourceCategory: string — one of: Marketplace, Professional Network, Recruiter Channel, Consulting Channel, Compliance Programme, Technology Practice, Direct/Referral
schema.title: string — role, engagement or opportunity title as found
schema.organisation: string — company, agency or body name
schema.description: string — raw description as found, unedited
schema.url: string or null — link to the original listing
schema.remote: boolean — true if the posting explicitly allows remote delivery
schema.domainTags: array of strings — any of: ADGL, AI Deployment Governance, AI Governance, GRC, Technology Risk, Third-Party Risk, Security Governance, DORA, EU AI Act, Fractional Advisory, Government/FedRAMP-GovRAMP-CMMC — used to build the domain-filtered report views

scores.timeRequired: number — 0-10, inverted: 10 = least time to pursue

schema.classification: string — one of: Apply, Immediate Proposal, Follow Recruiter, Relationship Building, Partnership, Ignore, Convert into Content, Convert into Product Idea
schema.routedTo: array of strings — downstream files this entry was written to on classification, e.g. ['08-Revenue-Hunter/pipeline.json', '06-CRM/company-intelligence.json']
schema.status: string — new, routed, in-progress, proposal-sent, won, lost, archived
schema.autoCollected: boolean — true if this entry came from the autonomous collection engine (runtime/collect.py) rather than manual entry
schema.autoScored: boolean — true if the eleven scores are heuristic estimates from a scraped posting, not a human judgement; treat as a starting point to verify, not a finished score
schema.matchedKeywords: array of strings — which configured keywords (runtime/config/keywords.json) matched this posting, present only for auto-collected entries
